taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Data Engineering, Data Engineer
core_skills: Data warehouse design, Data warehouse implementation, Kimball methodology, ETL development, SQL
skill_match_scores: Data warehouse design:0.0, Data warehouse implementation:0.0, Kimball methodology:0.0, ETL development:1.0, SQL:1.0
must_have_quals: Requires minimum BS in Computer Science or related field or combination of education and experience sufficient to perform duties at an experienced level, Must have a minimum of 3 years' experience (in addition to education) in a technical environment with data warehouse design and implementation, 3 Years of programming experience in SQL, Java or Python, In depth knowledge of Snowflake, Knowledge of Informatica, 1 Year + working as a DBA, Requires demonstrated ability to work in a team and collaborative environment, Strong communication and interpersonal skills, Love of learning new technologies and having fun, Ability to travel 10% of the time
preferred_quals: Preferred experience with assisting with SQL environments and migrating to modern platforms like Snowflake, Preferred experience with AWS Tooling, Snowflake, Domo, and Visual Importer, Experience modeling in Kimball methodology
core_responsibilities: Design, builds and maintain data warehouses (existing and from scratch) using Kimball and modern data methodologies, Debug support issues with the legacy environment and support our business users, Design and implement efficient data pipelines (ETLs) to integrate data from a variety of sources into Data Warehouse as well as data model changes that align with warehouse standards and backfill or other warehouse data management processes, Evaluates data design, database architecture, metadata and repositories for performance and effective design, Develop scalable ETL data pipelines with python, SQL, and AWS cloud tools, Optimization of existing SQL queries to improve reliability and performance, Develop and execute testing strategies to ensure high quality warehouse data, Provide documentation, training, and consulting for data warehouse users, Work with cross functional stakeholders to design and architect data warehouse and analytics solutions, Perform requirement and data analysis in order to support warehouse project definition
job_summary: Lamb Weston is a leading manufacturer in the food industry, known for its innovative approach and global presence. The Data Engineer will play a crucial role in modernizing data assets and analytics, supporting the transition from legacy systems to a modern data environment, and designing efficient data pipelines to drive business value.
